character.description: main slime wearing baked trait outfits, accessory attached to body curve

baby_green_muscle.action: baby green slime wearing a red training headband snug around its forehead following the head curve, idle loop, frame 2 soft bounce

baby_green_ranch.action: baby green slime wearing a straw farmer hat snugly on top of its head, brim wrapping the head curve, tiny sprout on the brim, idle loop, frame 2 soft bounce

baby_green_star.action: baby green slime with small golden star sparkles floating around its silhouette (never on the face), frame 2 with sparkles shifted for a twinkle loop

baby_green_dream.action: baby green slime wearing a soft blue nightcap drooping to the right with a white pom-pom, sleepy half-closed eyes, idle loop, frame 2 soft bounce

sea_muscle.action: sea blue slime wearing a red training headband snug around its forehead following the head curve, idle loop, frame 2 gentle watery bob

sea_ranch.action: sea blue slime wearing a straw farmer hat snugly on its head, brim wrapping the head curve, idle loop, frame 2 gentle watery bob

sea_star.action: sea blue slime with golden star sparkles floating around its silhouette (never on the face), frame 2 sparkles shifted for a twinkle loop

sea_dream.action: sea blue slime wearing a soft blue nightcap with white pom-pom, sleepy expression, idle loop, frame 2 gentle bob

gold_king_muscle.action: gold king slime with its small crown, wearing a red training headband around the forehead BELOW the crown, idle loop, frame 2 royal bounce

gold_king_ranch.action: gold king slime with its small crown, a straw farmer hat tilted at a jaunty angle beside the crown, idle loop, frame 2 royal bounce

gold_king_star.action: gold king slime with crown, golden star sparkles floating around its silhouette (never covering crown or face), frame 2 sparkles shifted for a twinkle loop

gold_king_dream.action: gold king slime with crown, a soft blue nightcap drooping behind the crown, sleepy expression, idle loop, frame 2 royal bounce

god_muscle.action: legendary rainbow god slime with crown, red training headband around the forehead below the crown, idle loop, frame 2 cosmic bounce

god_ranch.action: legendary rainbow god slime with crown, straw farmer hat tilted beside the crown, idle loop, frame 2 cosmic bounce

god_star.action: legendary rainbow god slime with crown, golden star sparkles floating around its silhouette (never covering crown or face), frame 2 sparkles shifted for a twinkle loop

god_dream.action: legendary rainbow god slime with crown, soft blue nightcap drooping behind the crown, sleepy expression, idle loop, frame 2 cosmic bounce

style: pixel-art-adjacent low-resolution game sprite, compact chibi/mascot-friendly proportions when the base allows it, chunky whole-body silhouette, thick dark 1-2 px outline, visible stepped/pixel edges, limited palette, flat cel shading with at most one small highlight and one shadow step, simple readable face, clear limbs, and no detail that disappears at small runtime size. Avoid polished illustration, painterly rendering, anime key art, 3D render, vector app-icon polish, glossy lighting, soft gradients, anti-aliased high-detail edges, and complex tiny accessories.
